body.title: GitHub Action: tagged release → PyPI publish for SWADL
body.result: swadl now live on PyPI; OIDC trusted publishing confirmed working on first tag push.
body.description:
Add a GitHub Actions workflow to SWADL repo that publishes to PyPI on every semver tag push. Uses pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish. Check that pyproject.toml name field is available on PyPI before publishing.

**Affected files:** .github/workflows/publish.yml, pyproject.toml
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** publish workflow only
**Test plan:** test against TestPyPI first; verify pip install swadl works
